  • Verwendungen von Player in controller

    Methoden in controller, die Player zurückgeben
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    static Player
    PlayerController.createNewPlayer(String name, String gender, Game game)
    Creates a new Player with the default starting attributes and assigns the player to the dungeon of the specified Game.
    static Player
    SavedataHandler.load()
    Loads the player from the save data file.
    Methoden in controller mit Parametern vom Typ Player
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    static void
    EncounterSystem.battle(GameFrame frame, BattleView battleView, List<EnemyPanel> enemyPanels, Player player, JButton[] buttons)
    Configures the battle actions and registers their event listeners.
    static void
    SavedataHandler.save(Player player)
    Saves the specified player to the save data file.
